_setting: the fantasy kingdom of Kerovnia — largely a timeless medieval-fantasy land of forests, paths, huts and palaces, but with occasional playful anachronisms (a rock-and-roll pianist, a chemistry laboratory). Render each scene exactly in whatever period and style its own contents imply; never force a scene to look medieval.
8: a dim room interior, a robed figure standing by a curtained arched window beside a tall ornate lamp
15: a guy performing "great balls of fire" at a piano
29: a dark rocky cliff and mountain crags against a pale evening sky
